poll.question: Marcus finally stopped waiting. Does he tell Ryan and Jade he's choosing them—or show it instead?

options.label: Tell them
options.desc: Name the choice aloud. Risk the peace for words.

options.label: Show them
options.desc: Let actions and warmth say everything. Tomorrow will prove it.

in_play.label: Tell him now
in_play.desc: Name the feeling. Deepen it with truth, risk disrupting the peace.
